item.title: v0.7.4
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • add psql format (#84)
  • add markdown format (#83)
  • add sleep command (#81)
  • add indexes command (#80)
  • add print command (#79)
  • add read command (#78)

🐞 Bug fixes

  • correct editor history not being tracked when enabled (#86)
  • correct ascii, plain and unicode format when there are no columns (#82)

📖 Documentation

  • update web docs (#85)

item.title: v0.7.3
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • add plain format (#77)
  • add rusqlite driver (#76)
  • provide help text on invalid command if available (#75)
  • additional localization (#74)

🐞 Bug fixes

  • suppress startup banner when commands or file are specified (#72)
  • correct unicode character width calculation (#71)

📖 Documentation

  • correct supported locales link (#70)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • improve test coverage (#73)

item.title: v0.7.2
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • add i18n support (#69)
  • update history command to allow configuration (#68)
  • add color command (#67)
  • add postgresql support for timestampz (#66)
  • add configurable command identifier (#65)

item.title: v0.7.1
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • add result highlighter for html, json, jsonl, xml, and yaml (#63)
  • add drivers command (#62)
  • add support for PostgreSQL bit and bit varying (#60)

🐞 Bug fixes

  • no-op empty commands (#64)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • improve test coverage (#61)
  • add postgresql and sqlite benchmarks (#59)

item.title: v0.7.0
item.content:encoded:
💥 Breaking changes

  • add executors (#56)

✨ Enhancements

  • allow shell output writer to be configured (#57)
  • add echo command (#55)

📖 Documentation

  • add security policy (#58)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • set branch for changelog (#54)
  • add executors (#56)

item.title: v0.6.0
item.content:encoded:
💥 Breaking changes

  • run commands from file, stdin, or command line (#53)
  • refactor QueryResult to be an async trait (#49)

✨ Enhancements

  • run commands from file, stdin, or command line (#53)

📦 Build system

  • add changelog generation job (#52)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • add pull request template (#51)
  • add github issue templates (#50)
  • refactor QueryResult to be an async trait (#49)

item.title: v0.5.2
item.content:encoded:
🛠️ Other improvements

  • add web analytics (#47)
  • improve test coverage (#46)
  • improve test coverage (#48)

item.title: v0.5.1
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • add html format (#45)
  • add xml format (#44)
  • add yaml format (#42)
  • add json and jsonl formats (#41)
  • add tsv formatter (#40)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • improve test coverage (#43)

item.title: v0.5.0
item.content:encoded:
💥 Breaking changes

  • add custom Result and Error types (#39)
  • add csv formatter (#38)

✨ Enhancements

  • add csv formatter (#38)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • add custom Result and Error types (#39)
  • remove table header highlight (#37)

item.title: v0.4.4
item.content:encoded:
📦 Build system

  • remove armv5te support (#36)

item.title: v0.4.3
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • add progress indicator to long running operations (#34)

🐞 Bug fixes

  • correct sqlx dependency (#35)

📖 Documentation

  • add downloads badge to readme (#31)

📦 Build system

  • make sqlx and optional dependency (#33)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • update driver manager test to work without sqlite feature (#32)

item.title: v0.4.2
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • install postgresql embedded to rsql configuration directory (#30)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • upgrade postgresql-embedded (#29)

item.title: v0.4.1
item.content:encoded:
🐞 Bug fixes

  • corrected sqlite conversion logic error where strings were treated as bytes (#28)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • remove invalid crate category (#27)
  • add driver interface tests (#26)

item.title: v0.4.0
item.content:encoded:
💥 Breaking changes

  • add shell and shellbuilder to facilitate configuring drivers, commands and formatters (#24)
  • add Formatters and FormatterManager. change .display command to .format (#21)

✨ Enhancements

  • add shell and shellbuilder to facilitate configuring drivers, commands and formatters (#24)

📖 Documentation

  • correct history document formatting (#20)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • add command tests to increase coverage (#25)
  • add table tests to improve coverage (#23)
  • improve table formatter test coverage (#22)
  • add Formatters and FormatterManager. change .display command to .format (#21)

item.title: v0.3.0
item.content:encoded:
💥 Breaking changes

  • refactor results to support configurable output formatting (#19)
  • refactor modules to better align with usage (#18)

✨ Enhancements

  • add support for postgresql void type (#17)

📖 Documentation

  • add initial command documentation (#16)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • refactor results to support configurable output formatting (#19)
  • refactor modules to better align with usage (#18)

item.title: v0.2.1
item.content:encoded:
📖 Documentation

  • add scaffolding for web documentation (#15)

item.title: v0.2.0
item.content:encoded:
💥 Breaking changes

  • add configurable driver support (#12)
  • refactor Engine to Connection (#14)
  • rename Commands to CommandManager (#13)

✨ Enhancements

  • add configurable driver support (#12)
  • add option/command to bail on the first error (#11)
  • convert byte results to base64 when printing results (#10)

📖 Documentation

  • update website changelog configuration (#9)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • refactor Engine to Connection (#14)
  • rename Commands to CommandManager (#13)

item.title: v0.1.4
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • add ability to detect/set locale and display numeric data with locale format (#8)
  • allow commands in rsql_core to be configured by caller (#6)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • internal: disable sqlite as default database url when the sqlite feature is not enabled (#7)

item.title: v0.1.3
item.content:encoded:
📖 Documentation

  • update documentation links (#5)

item.title: v0.1.2
item.content:encoded:
🛠️ Other improvements

  • add command tests (#4)

item.title: v0.1.1
item.content:encoded:
📖 Documentation

  • add documentation configuration (#2)

📦 Build system

  • add release publish jobs for additional CPU architectures (#3)

🛠️ Other improvements

  • add cli tests (#1)

item.title: v0.1.0
item.content:encoded:
✨ Enhancements

  • initial release (71f259e)
